results.rendered_html:
kirātī
1 A female Kirāta, a woman of the Kirāta tribe.
2 A woman who carries a fly-flap or chowri;  R. 16. 57. 
3 A bawd, a procuress.
4 Pārvatī in the disguise of a Kirātī.
5 The celestial Gaṅgā.
